pr.title: Record: Fused MLP (Triton+CUTLASS EVT) + Fast Causal N-Gram Tilt & Subword Certainty (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Fuses Triton TMA/CUTLASS EVT MLP kernels with Hessian-guided mixed int5/int6 GPTQ and fast causal n-gram tilt over SP4608 to fit more capacity.
techniques: - Fused Triton TMA forward and CUTLASS EVT backward MLP kernels with precomputed activation gradients
- Hessian-traced mixed int5/int6 GPTQ plus LR-floor warmdown to fit MLP 3.5× within 16 MB
- Fast causal n-gram tilt as sparse auxiliary memory for subword certainty on SP4608
